gosec.reason: Cloudflared worker execution is constrained to an explicit command allowlist, and PA_CLOUDFLARED_BINARY overrides are validated to absolute non-symlink regular executable files before command construction.
Client request URL is constructed from daemon transport config plus fixed route paths; current taint report is treated as false positive.
HTTP client call uses the same fixed control-plane route composition as request creation; no untrusted URL source in current call graph.
